summary: STEP B - P1 Row Usability testing complete. All features implemented correctly. Evidence rows show only 3 primary actions (View Files, Add/Upload, Request) with neutral grey styling. Check rows retain authoritative coloring (green/amber/red) with Record Check or Update buttons. History button moved to expanded section for both row types.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error due to AttributeError: NOT_STARTED in DocumentStatus enum
minor.note: Does not affect compliance file functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: STEP B - P1 Row Usability complete. Evidence rows (right_to_work_evidence, dbs_certificate_evidence, identity_evidence, proof_of_address_evidence) show neutral grey styling with only View Files, Add/Upload, and Request buttons. Check rows (right_to_work_check, dbs_status_check, identity_verification, address_verification) show authoritative coloring (green for verified, amber for partial, red for not recorded) with Record Check or Update buttons. History button is in expanded section footer for both row types. Previous checks count displayed in expanded Check rows.

evidence_row_simplified_actions.details: Evidence rows show only View Files (when files exist), Add/Upload, and Request buttons

evidence_row_neutral_grey_styling.details: Evidence rows have bg-gray-50/30 background, grey icon, grey badge, grey status colors

check_row_authoritative_coloring.details: Check rows show green (verified), amber (partial), or red (not recorded) styling

check_row_record_or_update_button.details: Check rows show 'Record Check' when no check exists, 'Update' when check exists

history_button_in_expanded_evidence.details: History button moved to expanded section footer with stats (active, pending, superseded, history)

history_button_in_expanded_check.details: History button in expanded section footer with previous checks count

previous_checks_count_display.details: Expanded Check rows show 'X previous checks' or 'First check'

evidence_row_data_testids.details: Evidence rows have data-testid='evidence-row-{key}' and buttons have appropriate testids

check_row_data_testids.details: Check rows have data-testid='check-row-{key}' and buttons have appropriate testids

EvidenceRow.js.lines_153_218: Simplified actions - only View Files, Upload/Add, Request buttons
EvidenceRow.js.lines_358_376: Footer with stats and View History button in expanded section
EvidenceRow.js.lines_71_78: Neutral grey status colors for all evidence states

CheckRow.js.lines_155_196: Record Check (no check) or Update (has check) buttons
CheckRow.js.lines_265_280: Footer with previous checks count and View History button
CheckRow.js.lines_53_65: Authoritative coloring (green/amber/red) based on verification status
